---
title: "Armelle Ballian"
about:
  id: template-area
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/armelleballian.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/armelleblln
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=aId4LewAAAAJ&hl=fr
    - icon: mouse
      text: Website department of Climatology and the Biosphere
      href: https://uni-tuebingen.de/en/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/geowissenschaften/arbeitsgruppen/geo-und-umweltnaturwissenschaften/geo-und-umweltnaturwissenschaften/climatology-and-the-biosphere/workgroup/team/armelle-ballian/
    - icon: person-vcard
      text: Contact
      href: https://vcard.link/card/IwDb.vcf
---
[comment]:  (Tasks for this page
Update the YAML header. you can check out different layouts of the pre-formatted part at <https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html#templates>
Update the legal information
Write a short introduction set of you
delete this section)
:::{#template-area}
I am currently postdoc within the *Climatology and the Biosphere* research group at the University of Tübingen (Germany). 

## Fields of specialization
Continental paleoclimate and paleoenvironmental dynamics, surface processes, geomorphology, stable isotope paleoaltimetry, terrestrial carbonates and paleosols, fault gouges, karst systems and cave climate monitoring, stable isotope geochemistry (δ^13^C, δ^17^O, δ^18^O, δ^2^H), and carbonate clumped (∆47) isotope thermometry.

## Contact

I'd be happy to connect regarding research, collaborations, or teaching opportunities.

 ✉️ **Email:** armelle.ballian@uni-tuebingen.de <br>
☎️ **Tel:** +49 7071 29 72492 <br>
📍 **Address:** Eberhard Karls University Tübingen, Geo- and Environmental Research Center, <br>
                Schnarrenbergstraße 94-96, D-72076 Tuebingen, Germany

:::
## News

May 2026: I presented my current work at the EGU26 conference in Vienna. <br>
March 2026: I successfully defended my PhD thesis! <br>


Below are some pictures from the fieldwork carried out during my Master’s, PhD and postdoc.
::: {.image-container}
![Falkensteiner Höhle, Germany](ArmelleFalki.jpg){width=50%}
*Falkensteiner Höhle, Swabian Alb (2025) ©Y. Wolfhard*

![Armantes section, Central Spain](pic2.jpg){width=50%}
*Armantes section, Central Spain (2022)*

![Mölltal Valley, Austria](pic4.jpg){width=50%}
*Mölltal Valley, Austria (2021)*

![Digne Valensole basin, SE France](pic1.jpeg){width=50%}
*Digne Valensole basin, SE France | Sampling pedogenic carbonate nodules (2021)*

![Chanthaburi Region, Thailand](pic3.jpg){width=50%}
*Chanthaburi, Thailand | Excavating beach ridges (2019) ©J. Miocic*

![Chanthaburi Region, Thailand](pic5.jpg){width=50%}
*Chanthaburi, Thailand | Excavating beach ridges (2019) ©S. Chawchai*
:::




---
